profile.description: One-knob preset for the cost/speed/depth levers. Explicitly set keys always win over the profile. Default: balanced.

model.description: Model id used for both the attacker and reviewer roles, e.g. claude-opus-4-8.

attacker_model.description: Override the model for the attacker role only. Falls back to `model` when null.

reviewer_model.description: Override the model for the reviewer role only. Falls back to `model` when null.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens per LLM call (max_tokens). Default: 4096.

attacker_max_output_tokens.description: Override max output tokens for the attacker. Falls back to max_output_tokens when null.

reviewer_max_output_tokens.description: Override max output tokens for the reviewer. Falls back to max_output_tokens when null.

provider_json_mode.description: Send response_format: {type: json_object} on every call (honored by OpenAI/Mistral/Ollama). Default: false.

included_paths.description: Paths scanned relative to the project root.

max_file_size_kb.description: Skip files larger than this many kilobytes.

import_sarif.description: Paths to SARIF 2.1.0 report files (Psalm, PHPStan, Progpilot, Semgrep, …) imported as additional risk markers for the attacker. Relative paths resolve against the audited project root. Default: [].

custom_risk_patterns.description: Project-specific regex risk markers, keyed by file-type bucket then marker name.

regex.description: PCRE pattern with delimiters, matched per line.

description.description: Short description rendered in the prompt.

secret_scrubbing.description: Redact secrets before file contents are sent to the LLM.

additional_patterns.description: Extra PCRE patterns whose matches are redacted.

audit.description: Orchestrator knobs for the attacker/reviewer loop.

max_iterations.description: Maximum attacker/reviewer iterations. Defaults to the active profile.

min_confidence.description: Minimum attacker confidence to forward a finding to the reviewer. Default: 0.6.

reviewer_batch_size.description: Findings reviewed per LLM call. Default: 1.

tools_enabled.description: Give the attacker cross-file investigation tools. Default: true.

structured_collection.description: Attacker records findings via the schema-enforced record_vulnerability tool. Default: true.

reviewer_structured_collection.description: Reviewer records verdicts via the schema-enforced record_review tool. Default: true.

stable_system_prompt.description: Emit a byte-stable attacker system prompt for provider prompt-cache reuse. Default: true.

max_tool_iterations.description: Maximum tool-call rounds per attacker chunk. Default: 8.

reviewer_tools_enabled.description: Give the reviewer the attacker's tool registry. Default: false.

reviewer_max_tool_iterations.description: Maximum tool-call rounds per reviewed finding. Default: 4.

reviewer_max_concurrent.description: Concurrent reviewer calls (one finding per call). Defaults to the active profile.

attacker_max_concurrent.description: Concurrent attacker chunk analyses in structured-collection mode. Defaults to the active profile.

baseline.description: Default path to a baseline file of accepted findings. Baselined findings skip the reviewer (saving its LLM calls) and are excluded from the report and exit code. The --baseline CLI option overrides this.

fail_on.description: Minimum aggregate risk level that makes audit:run exit 1 (the CI gate). Default: critical (only a CRITICAL risk level fails; planned to become high in the next major). The --fail-on CLI option overrides this.

excluded_types.description: Vulnerability types dropped from the report and the exit code, even when validated. Mutes a noisy class (e.g. missing_rate_limiting) without per-finding baselines. Wins over included_types. Default: [] (mutes nothing).

included_types.description: Allowlist of vulnerability types: when non-empty, only findings whose type is listed are reported and counted toward the exit code. Default: [] (includes every type).

enabled.description: Run the deterministic risk-marker pre-scan. Default: true.

lean_mode.description: Drop marker-free files before the LLM. Defaults to the active profile.

strategy.description: How files are grouped into LLM calls. Default: feature.

enabled.description: Run a cheap-model sweep first, escalating only flagged files. Default: false.

cheap_model.description: Model id for the cheap first pass. Falls back to the reviewer model when null.

enabled.description: Trim large PHP files to security-relevant slices. Defaults to the active profile.

min_lines_before_slicing.description: Skip slicing for files shorter than this. Default: 80.

enabled.description: Generate concrete PoC artifacts for qualifying findings. Defaults to the active profile.

severity_floor.description: Minimum severity that triggers PoC synthesis. Default: high.

max_tokens.description: Abort the audit past this many total tokens. null = unlimited.

max_cost_usd.description: Abort the audit past this estimated USD cost. null = unlimited.

max_attempts.description: Attempts per LLM call including the first. 1 disables retries.

initial_delay_ms.description: Base delay before the first retry, in milliseconds.

jitter_ratio.description: Jitter fraction applied to each delay.

requests_per_minute.description: Max LLM requests per minute. null disables this dimension.

input_tokens_per_minute.description: Max input tokens per minute. null disables this dimension.

output_tokens_per_minute.description: Max output tokens per minute. null disables this dimension.

enabled.description: Enable the attacker-chunk and reviewer-verdict filesystem caches. Default: true.

prompt_caching.description: Deprecated since 1.7 and ignored. Configure prompt caching on the AI platform in ai.yaml instead.

^when@[a-z0-9_-]+$.description: Symfony environment-scoped configuration block (when@dev, when@test, …). Mirrors the root schema so editors give completion and validation for symfony_security_auditor nested under when@<env>.
